title: Dashboard Navigation - Sidebar Items Display
description: Verify that the sidebar navigation displays correct items including Inbox, Sent, Drafts, and Delegations and that each navigates to the expected page.

steps.description: Log in to the application and land on the dashboard.
Verify sidebar is visible with navigation options: Inbox, Sent, Drafts, Delegations.
Click each sidebar item (Inbox, Sent, Drafts, Delegations) sequentially.
Verify the main view updates to show the corresponding email list or delegation tracking area for the clicked item.

title: Email Intelligence List - Priority Insights Display
description: Check that the Email Intelligence List shows all emails with correct AI-driven priority metrics such as urgency and sentiment analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to the Inbox view from the dashboard.
Verify that each email entry in the list displays AI-driven urgency and sentiment indicators.
Confirm the priority ranking order of emails is consistent with AI-assigned urgencies.

title: Email Detail View - AI Suggestions with Explainability
description: Validate that opening an email shows AI-generated reply suggestions along with an explainability panel that clarifies the rationale for each suggestion.

steps.description: Select an email from the inbox to open the detailed view.
Verify that a set of proactive AI-generated reply suggestions is visible.
Confirm that the explainability panel provides clear rationale for each suggested reply.
Ensure that the email thread history and attachment view functionality are accessible.

title: Delegation Workflow - Assign Email with Instructions and SLA
description: Test the delegation process allowing users to assign emails to other users including specifying instructions, SLA details, and verifying delegation status tracking.

steps.description: Open an email detail and trigger the delegation modal.
Assign the email to a user, enter delegation instructions and set an SLA.
Submit the delegation.
Confirm delegation is successfully created and visible in delegation tracking sections with status and SLA information.

title: Persona Management - Switch AI Personas
description: Verify that users can switch between different AI personas to customize email analysis and that the email detail updates accordingly.

steps.description: Open the persona management modal from the email detail view.
Switch to a different AI persona.
Check that the email AI analysis and reply suggestions update to reflect the characteristics of the selected persona.

title: Notification System - Real-time Email and Alert Notifications
description: Ensure real-time notifications for incoming emails and system alerts appear promptly and correctly on both web and mobile platforms.

steps.description: Simulate arrival of a new email or system alert.
Verify that a real-time notification popup or banner appears on the interface immediately.
Confirm notification is accessible and actionable on both desktop web and mobile responsive layouts.

title: Email Prioritization - Predictive Outcome Updates Based on User Feedback
description: Test that predicted outcomes for reply suggestions update appropriately when the user edits or provides feedback on the AI's suggestions.

steps.description: Open an email and select an AI-generated reply.
Modify the suggested reply and submit user feedback.
Verify that predicted outcome metrics refresh and reflect changes based on user modification.

title: Email Analysis Metrics Accuracy - Urgency and Sentiment
description: Validate that urgency and sentiment metrics are accurate and visibly integrated on the inbox list and detailed email views.

steps.description: Review multiple emails with varying content.
Verify that urgency and sentiment scores correspond logically to email content (e.g., urgent wording results in high urgency).
Confirm that these metrics appear both in list view and detail view consistently.

title: Theme Support - Dark and Light Mode Toggle
description: Verify that users can switch between dark and light themes seamlessly, and that all UI elements comply with high-contrast semantic color variables.

steps.description: Locate and use the theme toggle control.
Switch between dark mode and light mode.
Confirm that the entire UI updates accordingly with consistent styling and maintains premium design aesthetics.

title: Mobile Layout - Responsive UI and Touch Gestures
description: Ensure that the mobile-optimized layout supports all content access and interaction including swipe gestures and quick actions on small screen devices.

steps.description: Access the application on a mobile device or browser emulating mobile viewport.
Check that all content including dashboard, email lists, and detail views are fully visible and usable.
Perform swipe gestures on email list items to trigger quick actions.
Verify the quick action buttons display and work as expected (e.g., mark read, delegate).

title: Security Validation - Encrypted Data Handling
description: Test backend security protocols ensuring AES-256 encryption is active for sensitive data and that secure OAuth2 authentication functions correctly.

steps.description: Perform login via OAuth2 authentication.
Verify login is successful and tokens are securely stored.
Send a request to save sensitive email data.
Check backend logs or data storage to confirm AES-256 encryption is applied.

title: Personal Decision Memory - AI Adaptation to User Corrections
description: Validate that the AI's decision memory system learns from user corrections and adapts future reply suggestions accordingly over multiple interactions.

steps.description: Provide corrections or modifications to AI-generated replies over several different emails.
Observe that subsequent suggested replies evolve closer to user preferences reflecting learning.

title: Landing Page - Animated Introduction Display
description: Verify the landing page displays an animated introduction explaining decision intelligence concepts clearly and that the animation performs smoothly.

steps.description: Navigate to the landing page.
Confirm the presence of the animated introduction content.
Verify the animation plays without visual glitches or delays.
